hooks.command: input=$(cat); echo "$input" | jq -e -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '(^|[^a-zA-Z])gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+create([[:space:]]|$)' || exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check 1>&2 || { echo 'Pre-PR checks failed. Fix typecheck / lint / format before opening PR.' 1>&2; exit 2; }
hooks.statusMessage: Rodando typecheck + lint + format antes do gh pr create...
